output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?plant ?plantLabel ?capacityMW ?commissioning WHERE {
  ?plant wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q159719 .
  ?plant wdt:P575 ?commissioning .
  ?plant p:P2109 / psv:P2109 ?capValue .
  ?capValue wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount ; wikibase:quantityUnit ?unit .
  BIND(IF(?unit = wd:Q712287 , ?amount , IF(?unit = wd:Q71222 , ?amount / 1000 , IF(?unit = wd:Q6308 , ?amount / 1000000 , IF(?unit = wd:Q25326 , ?amount * 1000 , 0)))) AS ?capacityMW)
  ?plant rdfs:label ?plantLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?plantLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(?capacityMW > 0)
  FILTER(?commissioning >= "1800-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?otherPlant wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q159719 .
    ?otherPlant wdt:P575 ?otherComm .
    ?otherPlant p:P2109 / psv:P2109 ?otherCap .
    ?otherCap wikibase:quantityAmount ?oAmount ; wikibase:quantityUnit ?oUnit .
    BIND(IF(?oUnit = wd:Q712287 , ?oAmount , IF(?oUnit = wd:Q71222 , ?oAmount / 1000 , IF(?oUnit = wd:Q6308 , ?oAmount / 1000000 , IF(?oUnit = wd:Q25326 , ?oAmount * 1000 , 0)))) AS ?otherCapMW)
    FILTER(?otherComm < ?commissioning && ?otherCapMW > ?capacityMW)
  }
}
ORDER BY ?commissioning
LIMIT 20

SELECT ?plant ?plantLabel ?capacityMW ?commissioning WHERE {
  ?plant wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q159719 .
  ?plant wdt:P575 ?commissioning .
  ?plant p:P2109/psv:P2109 ?capValue .
  ?capValue wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount ;
          wikibase:quantityUnit ?unit .
  
  # Convert to MW
  BIND(IF(?unit = wd:Q712287, ?amount,
         IF(?unit = wd:Q71222, ?amount / 1000,
          IF(?unit = wd:Q6308, ?amount / 1000000,
           IF(?unit = wd:Q25326, ?amount * 1000, 0)
          ))
       ) AS ?capacityMW)

  ?plant rdfs:label ?plantLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?plantLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(?capacityMW > 0)
  FILTER(?commissioning >= "1800-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)

  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?otherPlant wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q159719 .
    ?otherPlant wdt:P575 ?otherComm .
    ?otherPlant p:P2109/psv:P2109 ?otherCap .
    ?otherCap wikibase:quantityAmount ?oAmount ;
              wikibase:quantityUnit ?oUnit .

    BIND(IF(?oUnit = wd:Q712287, ?oAmount,
           IF(?oUnit = wd:Q71222, ?oAmount / 1000,
            IF(?oUnit = wd:Q6308, ?oAmount / 1000000,
             IF(?oUnit = wd:Q25326, ?oAmount * 1000, 0)
            ))
         ) AS ?otherCapMW)

    FILTER (?otherComm < ?commissioning && ?otherCapMW > ?capacityMW)
  }
}
ORDER BY ?commissioning
LIMIT 20
